response.justification: Bogdan brings over 10 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, aligning strongly with the required stack. His hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, testing frameworks, containerization, and open-source contributions demonstrates architectural maturity and a customer-oriented mindset. His diverse background across languages and domains shows adaptability and strong problem-solving skills, though his German language limitation may slightly hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based team.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS
Proven expertise in AI-agent development and testing frameworks (Vitest/Jest)
Strong open-source contributions and dev-ops skills (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, potentially limiting team integration in Berlin
Lack of explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin/Java in recent roles
Some roles show heavy use of DLang, which may raise questions about current focus on required stack
